siteName: Connect Ijebu Roots — IID Omo Orimolusi in Diaspora

/.title: Ijebu Igbo Descendants — Omo Orimolusi in Diaspora
/.description: IID Omo Orimolusi unites Ijebu-Igbo descendants in the UK & worldwide — heritage, events, community projects, and ways to join or donate.

/about.title: About IID — Ijebu Igbo Descendants UK Association
/about.description: Ijebu Igbo Descendants (Awa Omo Orimolusi) Worldwide is a UK diaspora community promoting the culture, welfare and development of Ijebu-Igbo, a Yoruba town in Ogun State.

/impact.title: Our Impact — Ijebu Igbo Community Projects | IID
/impact.description: See how IID Omo Orimolusi drives development in Ijebu-Igbo — community projects, scholarships, and diaspora-funded initiatives in the homeland.

/team.title: Our Team — IID Executive | Ijebu Igbo Descendants
/team.description: Meet the executive committee leading Ijebu Igbo Descendants in Diaspora (IID Omo Orimolusi), serving the Ijebu-Igbo community in the UK and worldwide.

/heritage.title: Ijebu Igbo Heritage: Orimolusi, Kings & History
/heritage.description: Explore Ijebu-Igbo history, the Orimolusi paramount ruler, and the five quarters and kings of this Yoruba town in Ogun State, Nigeria.

/events.title: Ojude Oba & Ijebu Igbo Events | IID Diaspora
/events.description: Ojude Oba festival, AGM and Ijebu-Igbo community events — dates, regberegbe age groups, and how the diaspora celebrates Ijebu heritage.

/gallery.title: Gallery — Ijebu Igbo Community & Events | IID
/gallery.description: Photos from Ijebu-Igbo cultural celebrations, Ojude Oba, AGMs and IID diaspora gatherings across the UK and the homeland.

/contact.title: Contact IID — Ijebu Igbo Descendants UK
/contact.description: Get in touch with Ijebu Igbo Descendants in Diaspora (Omo Orimolusi UK) — membership, partnership, events and general enquiries.

/news.title: Ijebu Igbo News & Community Updates | IID
/news.description: Latest news from Ijebu-Igbo and the IID Omo Orimolusi diaspora — Orimolusi updates, community announcements, and event reports.

/tourism.title: Visit Ijebu Igbo: Attractions & Landmarks
/tourism.description: Things to do in Ijebu-Igbo, Ogun State — top landmarks, heritage sites, and tourism tips for diaspora visitors returning home.

/ojowo.title: Ojowo, Ijebu Igbo — Olokine of Ojowo | Heritage
/ojowo.description: Discover Ojowo, one of the towns of Ijebu-Igbo (Orimolusi Kingdom), its Olokine ruler, chiefs and Baales within the Orimolusi traditional council.

/japara.title: Japara, Ijebu Igbo — Abijaparako of Japara | Heritage
/japara.description: Discover Japara, one of the towns of Ijebu-Igbo (Orimolusi Kingdom), its Abijaparako ruler, history, chiefs and Ituns within the Orimolusi traditional council.

/atikori.title: Atikori, Ijebu Igbo — Keegbo of Atikori | Heritage
/atikori.description: Discover Atikori, one of the towns of Ijebu-Igbo (Orimolusi Kingdom), its Keegbo ruler, eight Itun agba, heritage places and anthem within the Orimolusi traditional council.

/oke-sopen.title: Oke-Sopen, Ijebu Igbo — Sopenlukale of Oke-Sopen | Heritage
/oke-sopen.description: Discover Oke-Sopen, one of the towns of Ijebu-Igbo (Orimolusi Kingdom), its Sopenlukale ruler and the full history of past rulers since 1886.

/oke-agbo.title: Oke-Agbo, Ijebu Igbo — Bejeroku of Oke-Agbo | Heritage
/oke-agbo.description: Discover Oke-Agbo, one of the towns of Ijebu-Igbo (Orimolusi Kingdom), its Bejeroku ruler and the Baales of its constituent villages.

/imope-ijebu.title: Imope-Ijebu — Onimope of Imope-Ijebu | Heritage
/imope-ijebu.description: Discover Imope-Ijebu, one of the towns of Ijebu-Igbo (Orimolusi Kingdom), and its Onimope ruler.

/aparaki.title: Aparaki — Alaparaki of Aparaki | Heritage
/aparaki.description: Discover Aparaki, one of the towns of Ijebu-Igbo (Orimolusi Kingdom), and its Alaparaki ruler.

/donate.title: Donate to Ijebu Igbo — Unity House Fund | IID
/donate.description: Support Ijebu-Igbo hometown projects and the Unity House fund. Your donation helps build community development and scholarships.

/announcements.title: Announcements — Ijebu Igbo Community | IID
/announcements.description: Births, obituaries, congratulations and notices from the Ijebu Igbo Descendants (Omo Orimolusi) diaspora community.

/members.title: Members — Ijebu Igbo Descendants Directory | IID
/members.description: The Ijebu Igbo Descendants in Diaspora member directory — connect with Omo Orimolusi members across clans and locations worldwide.

/scholarship.title: Ijebu Igbo Scholarship Fund | IID Omo Orimolusi
/scholarship.description: The IID scholarship supports students of Ijebu-Igbo descent. Learn eligibility, how to apply, and how to support Ijebu-Igbo education.

/travel.title: UK to Ijebu Igbo Travel Guide (via Lagos)
/travel.description: Step-by-step travel guide from the UK to Ijebu-Igbo — London to Lagos flights, Lagos to Ijebu-Igbo routes, distance, and local tips.

/videos.title: Video Archive — Ijebu Igbo Events | IID
/videos.description: Watch recordings of IID events, AGMs, Ojude Oba, and Ijebu-Igbo cultural celebrations from the Omo Orimolusi diaspora community.

/join.title: Join Ijebu Igbo Descendants UK | IID Membership
/join.description: Become a member of Ijebu Igbo Descendants in Diaspora (Omo Orimolusi UK). Connect with your roots, community and hometown projects.

/businesses.title: Ijebu Igbo Business Directory — Diaspora | IID
/businesses.description: Find and support Ijebu-Igbo businesses and entrepreneurs across the UK and diaspora in the IID community business directory.
